title: SCoordinates
description: Hide coords in f3 and show it if you hand a special item show coords in action bar
body:
![SC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b28965252cf608b254ab1ac0e5d28c1198f9366.png)

The SCoordinates plugin for Minecraft is designed to hide player coordinates from the F3 debug screen, enhancing gameplay by preventing easy access to location information. This feature is ideal for survival and adventure servers where you want to increase the challenge and excitement by limiting coordinate visibility.

Players can only see their coordinates when holding a specific item, which can be configured in the plugin's settings. This allows server administrators to choose any item that fits their gameplay style or server theme.

Additionally, SCoordinates supports MiniMessage and Legacy format for text customization, providing flexibility in how information is displayed to players. Whether you want to use colorful text or different formatting styles, the plugin ensures that your server's aesthetic and communication preferences are met.

With SCoordinates, you can create a more immersive and challenging experience for your players by controlling when and how they access their location information.
